title: 続きを/voteで続けて。 • consensus mode の前提を確認します。まず Claude と GLM の live lane を起動できるかを確認し、同時に現在の auth- stale 導線設計を維持したまま continuation 可能かを見ます。 • Ran which glm └ glm not found • Explored └ Read agent-glm-general-reviewer.json, agent-claude-general-reviewer.json ────────────────────────────────────────────────...
summary_text: - **Asset drift check:** load production `/happy/` and `/happy/auth/` with cache-bust (`?v=...`) and confirm deployed bundle includes current nav/screen structure and auth-stale copy; mismatch vs branch UI indicates stale CDN/service-worker asset. - **Auth-route regression check:** force an `auth-stale` state, tap `再認証する`, and verify redirect goes to configured `/happy/auth/` path (not `/cockpit` fallback), then returns to the exact `returnTo` (`screen/filter/task`) context. - **Task-instruction parity check:** open a task detail in production and verify whether task-scoped natural-language follow-up input exists; if absent, mark deploy as “monitor-only parity” and not full control-surface parity. - **Telemetry parity check:** verify production UI actually renders operator cost/comms telemetry (provider mix, comm count, cost/tokens/budget state); if telemetry data exists in API but not on screen, treat completion as false-positive.
